source_description: Create a feature specification for implementing the Qwiratry query operators as described in Operators.md. This includes I/O operators (parse, render, source, destination), map-reduce operators (selection, sort, map, reduce), navigation operators (child, parent, descendant, ancestor, etc.), and set operators (union, intersection, difference, joins, etc.). All operators must be implemented as Query AST objects that are interpreted by Walkers during planning and executed via QueryIterators.
